daily_tips.tip: Take a 5-minute break every hour to stay fresh and focused.
Keep a plant on your desk — it improves air quality and mood.
Drink a glass of water first thing in the morning to kickstart your metabolism.
Write your to-do list the night before to start the day with clarity.
Take the stairs instead of the lift for a quick energy boost.
Practice deep breathing for 2 minutes to reduce stress instantly.
Get natural sunlight within the first hour of waking up.
Turn off notifications during deep work sessions.
Prep your lunch the night before to save time and eat healthier.
Smile at three people today — it's contagious!
Focus on one task at a time for better productivity.
Use the Pomodoro technique: 25 min work, 5 min break.
Your brain works best in the first 2 hours after waking.
Keep your phone in another room while sleeping.
A 10-minute walk after lunch improves afternoon focus.
Decorate your workspace with items that inspire you.
Drink cold water to boost alertness and metabolism.
Read for 15 minutes before bed to improve sleep quality.
Say good morning to your colleagues — it builds rapport.
Keep a gratitude journal to boost your mood.

weekly_win.headline: Landed the Henderson Account!
weekly_win.detail: After three months of hard work and outstanding collaboration, we have officially signed one of our biggest clients to date.

announcements.title: Welcome to the Team Noticeboard!
announcements.body: Everything you see here is controlled by editing data.json on GitHub. Change anything and push — it updates within minutes.

target.label: Monthly Sales Target
target.message: Keep pushing — we are on track for a strong finish!

tasks.text: Book team lunch for end of month

ticker: Welcome to the new and improved team noticeboard!
All-Hands meeting this Friday at 10am — do not forget!
Q1 expense reports are due by end of week
Big shoutout to Sarah for landing the Henderson account!
We are at 74% of our monthly target — let's finish strong!

handpicked.author: Sarah M.
handpicked.text: Absolutely outstanding service from the moment we arrived. The front desk team were incredibly welcoming and professional. Would highly recommend!

handpicked.author: James T.
handpicked.text: Exceptional experience from start to finish. The staff went above and beyond to make our stay special.

handpicked.author: Emma R.
handpicked.text: Wonderful hotel with a fantastic team. The attention to detail is remarkable.

handpicked.author: David L.
handpicked.text: Really impressed with the level of service. Great location too.

handpicked.author: FoodieL
handpicked.text: Incredible food and atmosphere. The Sunday roast was the best I've had in London!

handpicked.author: DinnerDate
handpicked.text: Perfect spot for a special occasion. Menu was creative and beautifully presented.

handpicked.author: LunchBreak
handpicked.text: Great lunch menu with plenty of choice. Quick and efficient service.

handpicked.author: WeekendDiner
handpicked.text: Outstanding from start to finish. The cocktails were exceptional!
